name: Rotterdam (Netherlands)

colors.symbolism: from the city's coat of arms
the silver pale of the city's arms

description: A horizontal tribar of green, white and green in equal widths.
history: Adopted by the Rotterdam city council on 10 February 1949; the green-and-white colours derive from the city's coat of arms (a silver pale on green).

features.symbolism: the colours of the city's coat of arms
